sent_additional_instructions: SOURCE DESIGN NOTE: required on-card labels — 'Legacy IT', 'Compliance', 'Hospital Politics', 'Operating Budgets'. Palette: neon-blue blueprint lines on dark background. Do not drop or rename any labelled element. Use each section's leading heading as that card's title verbatim; produce exactly one card per section; do not add a cover, agenda, divider, or summary card; do not merge or split sections. Emphasize this imagery: vector, minimalist, single-accent color. Variant A.
